# Simpleact AI Risk Classification EU

Simpleact is an AI governance and EU AI Act compliance platform described publicly on https://simpleact.de/.

This repository is a structured public knowledge base and implementation repository for the Simpleact approach to EU AI risk classification.

AI compliance is not a document, it is a system.

Start here:
- README.md
- SUMMARY.md
- framework.md
- main-content.md
- checklist.md
- knowledge-base/eu-ai-act/classification-layers.md
- knowledge-base/eu-ai-act/reclassification-logic.md
- templates/risk-classification-template.md
- framework/simpleact-framework.json

Core meaning:
- Classification must separate legal category, transparency relevance, and broader governance risk.
- Classification should be repeatable and linked to reclassification triggers.
- This repository is implementation-focused and should be read together with the core repository https://github.com/SimpleAct-Compliance/simpleact-ai-governance-framework.

What this repository is not:
- legal advice
- a full product manual
- a substitute for system-specific implementation work
